raw_consumer_statement:

I WAS FORCED TO BUY STUFF ONLINE FROM THE FOLLOWING MERCHANTS : XXXX. XXXX XXXX. XXXX XXXX. XXXX  XXXX. XXXX XXXX. XXXX ( XXXX  ) XXXX. XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX. XXXX XXXX. XXXX XXXX. XXXX  I DID NOT GET ANY FOOD UNTIL IT WAS ALREADY SPOILED & INEDIBLE, WASTING UP TO ~ XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX!!! 

I COULDN'T GET ANYTHING RIGHT! NOTHING WAS OFFERED UNTO ME THAT WAS CORRECT! 

I NOW OWE A GRAND TOTAL OF {$2400.00} FOR STUFF THAT I DIDN'T GET, I DIDN'T GET IT TO BE ABLE TO EAT IT, OR ANY SUCH THING!!! 

I... 

I ALSO CALLED AMEX MULTIPLE TIMES NOW! 

THEY BASED ME UPON A STEREOTYPE, AND THEY BARELY HAPPENED TO BE OF HELP TO ME AT ALL! 

ME, THE BENEFICIARY, TO THE TRUSTEES, AMERICAN EXPRESS & IT'S AFFILIATES, THE BENEFICIARY WAS UNJUSTLY & UNRIGHTEOUSLY FORCED INTO A PREDICAMENT TO PAY A BILL UNJUSTLY DUE TO HIM, WHILE THEY, THE TRUSTEES, ABUSED THEIR RIGHTS AFFORDED AND NOT AFFORDED TO THEM, AS PER XXXX XXXX LAW, TO HARM THE CONSUMER. THEREFORE, BY IN RESPECT TO THE LAW OF THE LAND AND THE LAW OF THE SEA, GOVERNING THE UNITED STATES OF AMERICA, THE STATE OF TEXAS, & XXXX XXXX, A XXXX XXXX XXXX PAIN & UNDUE HARDSHIP HANDED UNTO THE BENEFICIARY, THE TRUSTEES ARE ACCUSED OF MALFEASANCE, UNJUSTLY CREDIT REPORTING PRACTICES, & UNJUST & PREDITORY CREDIT PRACTICES.
